title: San Francisco Homelessness NGO Review Value Profile
target_universe: San Francisco homelessness-service nonprofit candidates selected from official payment exposure plus citation-ready public-record dings
language_rules: Treat public output as source-cited review leads, not legal findings.
Use official legal terms only when an official source supports the term.
Preserve named-party distinctions between entity findings, connected-party charges, and third-party transaction records.
Describe possible waste, fraud, abuse, mismanagement, or off-scope use as a review hypothesis until a human validates the underlying records.

source_connectors.name: San Francisco Open Data nonprofit spending payment rows
San Francisco board, committee, and contract approval files
San Francisco HSH contract, monitoring, and corrective-action files

Episcopal Community Svcs of SF Inc: Episcopal Community Services of San Francisco
St Vincent De Paul Society of SF: St. Vincent de Paul Society of San Francisco

target_discovery_rules: Seed from official San Francisco payment exposure.
Add mandatory official adverse-record seeds even when payment exposure is lower.
Rank by Review Value Score, not by dollars alone.

forensic_tests.question: Do SF HSH payments map to contract purpose, invoices, and deliverables for the same period?
forensic_tests.human_next_step: Pull SF HSH contracts, invoices, deliverables, monitoring letters, and corrective actions for the entity.

human_action_rules: Prioritize official adverse records, audit findings, and payment-to-deliverable gaps.
Every next step must name the document family a human should obtain.
Do not call a no-record public search clearance.
